location.name: Ramat-Gan, Israel
location.arrival_instructions:
Aqua is located at Zisman 14 Street , Ramat Gan.

Entrance through the iron gate at the "Modai" Bridge (next to the 'Savidor Mercaz' train station).

The office is conveniently located right next to the exit of the Savidor train station, making it easily accessible if you choose to arrive by train.

If you prefer to drive, you can park in the underground parking lot of the Leonardo City Tower Hotel ("Central Park" parking), starting from level -2 and below.

Take the elevator up to floor L (Lobby), exit the building to the street, and head toward the Modai Bridge (14 Zisman Street).

Enter through the black iron gate – you'll find the Aqua Security offices right there.

Make sure to bring your parking ticket with you – the office manager will provide you with a payment sticker for exit.

When you reach the iron gate, press the intercom and let us know you’ve arrived for an interview at Aqua Security.
Once the gate opens, walk in and turn left toward the glass door – this leads to the lobby and reception area for 'Aqua Security' and 'Trigo'.  A representative will be there to greet you.

location.name: Hyderabad, India
location.arrival_instructions: Aqua Security Software, C/ O is located at Oyo workspace, Level 4, Business square, Opposite: Hitex. (Chocolate room building),Madhapur, Hyderabad.

location.name: Burlington, MA US
location.arrival_instructions:
Our address is: 800 District Avenue, Suite 510 Burlington, MA 01803

Follow the main road to the end of the office park and take a left. The main entrance to building 800 will be on your left. There is plenty of parking in front of the building and there is also a parking garage.

Take the elevator to the right up to the 5th floor. Turn right and you will see Aqua. Ring the bell and someone will greet you.
